_comment: Updated: fixed git dependency URLs to match lockfile (michaeltout forks with generic-signed-request/generic-request-changes branches, BitGoJS at pinned commit). Added blake2b-wasm resolution to prevent dead BitGo/blake2b-wasm repo reference.
name: update-identity-request-creator

scripts.update-verus-libs: yarn remove verus-typescript-primitives && yarn add 'git+https://github.com/VerusCoin/verus-typescript-primitives.git' && yarn remove @bitgo/utxo-lib && yarn add 'git+https://github.com/VerusCoin/BitGoJS.git#utxo-lib-verus' && yarn remove verusd-rpc-ts-client && yarn add 'git+https://github.com/VerusCoin/verusd-rpc-ts-client' && yarn remove verusid-ts-client && yarn add 'git+https://github.com/VerusCoin/verusid-ts-client.git'
